name: led-stream-controller
description: Web interface to control WLED/Govee/Hue lamps based on Twitch streamers, emotes, and events

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check src/api/routes.js && node --check src/database.js && node --check src/effect-manager.js && node --check src/lamps/wled.js && node --check src/lamps/govee.js && node --check src/lamps/hue.js
